title: Alpha Clouds
body:
**Alpha Clouds** makes clouds more transparent and nothing else. 
Available in two versions with different transparency levels – for both the new clouds (from 1.21.6) and the old clouds. The new clouds are compatible with older versions.

## In version 1.21.6, clouds.png no longer supports color changes, so Alpha Clouds will not work.

### Compared vanilla old clouds and 50% more transparent old clouds:

![Compare](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a4519122f6f184c6274f7fd7d148baed6ee287b5.png)

Feel free to use **Alpha Clouds** in your projects, but please do not change description of resourcepack.
